note: All 9 rubrics in quality.json pass. Git-based f2p tests (test_non_object_guard_rejects_invalid_types, test_guard_uses_valid_object_method, test_lookup_behavior_with_non_object_argument) correctly detect fix vs no-fix. The Docker images (task-env and task-env-gold) did not have bun installed at /tmp/bun-linux-x64/bun, causing test_dns_tests_pass_after_fix to fail. Fixed by creating task-env-fixed and task-env-gold-fixed images with bun installed at /tmp/bun-linux-x64/bun via: apt-get install -y unzip && curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | BUN_INSTALL=/tmp/bun-linux-x64 bash && ln -sf /tmp/bun-linux-x64/bin/bun /tmp/bun-linux-x64/bun. Validation now passes: NOP=0 (3 f2p fail + 11 p2p pass), GOLD=1 (all 14 pass).
